name: selllo-slack-ping
description: Connectivity test — run manually to confirm all engine systems are online. Sends a Slack message to #selll-engine.

parameters.body:
{"text": ":white_check_mark: *SELLL Revenue Engine — ONLINE*

All systems go:
• Apollo.io enrichment: ready
• Hunter.io verification: ready
• HubSpot CRM (portal 43603832): ready
• n8n orchestrator: *this message*
• Claude API (ADB generation): ready
• Slack notifications: ready

_Awaiting first campaign launch._"}
